transcript.text:
[Back in my days]
[It's my day off]
[I'm not working today]
I heard this place has been very popular recently
[Player has entered]
[My heart]
[Let's go for it]
Do you like to drink? Yes
[But I'm here to eat]
She came here to eat noodles?
[A bowl of udon too]
[Shocked]
[Not in love anymore]
Hello everyone~
There's been this place I've been wanting to visit near my store
They open at 5pm

So I am heading there now
[Excited]
[Rose Mansion, city of Isu]
It's a famous bar I've never been here
Hello
Can I film in here?
Yes
Thank you
[Retro concept]
They have chips too
There's a lot of food on the menu I see pasta
Our spicy chicken with beef intestine stew is popular
I'm craving the Jjapaguri noodles (jjapaghetti+neoguri)
Should I order 5 of them?
[What..?] 2 servings?
1 order has 2 servings

Then how many do I need to order? Should I just get every noodle bowl?
Excuse me
I'll take 1 of every noodle
From Jjapaguri to seafood ramyun
Alright
It's been a while since I had this drink
Tasty
[Time of patience]
I'm hungry
Thank you
Here's the Jjapaguri
That's a lot of food
2 servings
Thank you
Thank you
I'll start eating after everything comes out

Or should I just start?
I'm just going to eat
I can't wait
This was on the top of their list
Fried egg
Looks good
Bon appetit
It must be really hot Look at the smoke
Eating ramyun from restaurants hit different vs eating it at home
It's made the same way but tastes so different
Wrap it with the egg white
Hot
Thank you
Where's my other plate? I can't wait
Pop the egg yolk
Sunnyside up is the best

We're too lazy to make the fried eggs when we're at home, right?
I love having the fried eggs
I have to get a thumbnail with all the noodles, but 1 is almost gone already
Oh no
I wanted to eat it together, but it's gone
Thank you
Spicy seafood with black bean noodles this time
Need to mix the sauce from the bottom
It's good
This is so good It's going to disappear so fast
I personally like this better than the Jjapaguri
Pop the yolk
Yum
Fire Jjapaghetti this time
I think this one was made first It's stuck together
Yes, I think this is the fire chicken noodles I can smell it

Yup
Spicy
I'm awake now
A bit of the seafood ramyun
Ramyun noodles will get bloated
Since it's a seafood ramyun,
I see shrimp and manila clams
A lot of vegetables There's also a kick to it
Oh my! It's Tzuyang!
No way!
[They came to eat and saw Tzuyang]
I'm embarrassed
I'll eat some udon noodles to neutralize the spiciness
The seafood noodle wasn't spicy
The fire one is very spicy
My lips are shaking

Ok fine
[Ready]
[Reload]
[Retreat]
I'll eat that last
This is very tasty
I like that it has a lot of veggies,
but it's so hard for me to pick them out
What kind of ramyun is this?
I'm not too sure
I usually know it
Actually, I don't
I can tell Jin ramyun and Shin ramyun apart
The seafood flavor makes it hard to guess
Fried chicken sounds good too
I want some chicken

[Thinking about food while eating food]
Will it be hot?
I'm scared to eat this
My mouth has been burning for 10 minutes
But I'm almost left with that plate soon
I'm terrified
Udon tastes amazing
The soup
I approve
The egg
Sunnyside up
It splashed everywhere
Should I wash it with the soup?
Put some soup in here
It burns as soon as I eat it
I thought the jjapaghetti will neutralize the spiciness

But it's just very spicy
Maybe with this soup?
Can I wash it in here?
[Cool down the spiciness]
[Failed] Why is it so spicy?
How is she eating all of this
It's hard for men to eat all of that
[Who is she?]
[A restaurant owner]
Spicy
I'll try the spicy chicken with beef intestines stew and pasta next time with some alcohol
I'll also try the other surrounding restaurants here
Thanks everyone~
Bill please
I'll visit your store soon
I will personally deliver the food here
